outcome_record.event_name: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group Stage — England vs USA (MetLife, New Jersey)

prediction.pre_match_note: World Cup 2026 Group Stage Match 2. England vs USA at MetLife (largest US market). Group Stage weight 0.45. England ATM higher globally; USA home tournament × 1.15. New Jersey crowd: diverse but large English diaspora in NYC metro. NCSI active for English club tokens.

calibration_flags.notes: FIRST WORLD CUP 2026 MATCH CALIBRATION RECORD. Group Stage weight 0.45 applied. England ATM signal in WC context validated. USA home tournament × 1.15 partially offset by England quality advantage. NCSI for English EPL club tokens confirmed active.
